title: genista polyanthos subsp. hystrix
intro: Genista polyanthos subsp. hystrix, also known as the spiny broom or Italian broom, is a flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a shrub that grows up to 3 meters tall, with a dense, spiny stem and yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Genista polyanthos subsp. hystrix include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
